mapper.insert:
insert into store_attention
storeAttentionId,
observerId,
storeGroupId,
attentionStatus,
reportType,
attentionDate,
#{storeAttentionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{observerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{attentionStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{reportType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{attentionDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: select ui.userId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, ui.sex, case when ua.attentionStatus = 1 then 1 else 0 END as attentionStatus from store_attention sa inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = sa.observerId left join user_attention ua on ua.attentedId = sa.observerId and ua.observerId = #{userId} where sa.storeGroupId = #{storeGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from store_attention sa inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = sa.observerId where sa.storeGroupId = #{storeGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
